OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreatePNCRecords

childElements.name: DM_CreateProviderNetworkContractRec
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "Clinician" : "%Clinician%", "hpfList" : "%hpfList%", "Status" : "%Status%", "ContractId" : "%ContractId%", "ProviderId" : "%ProviderId%", "PayerId" : "%PayerId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateProviderNetworkContractClone", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
